backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko canister defining an empty actor.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing feature IDs, related files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of key frontend source files.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based theme styles with OKLCH color tokens, layout resets, and print rules.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry point loading the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React router setup defining all application routes and wrapping providers.
frontend/src/components/ai/FloatingAIBut: Floating AI button that navigates to the AI page and stays fixed with high z-index.
frontend/src/components/editor/AddQuesti: Dialog for creating a new question heading with title and planned count fields.
frontend/src/components/editor/AutoGrowT: Textarea component that auto-resizes between min and max rows based on content.
frontend/src/components/editor/FloatingR: Floating draggable toolbox for desktop that lets users pick sections, headings, and add various question types to a paper.
frontend/src/components/editor/InsertFro: Dialog for selecting board and standard before inserting questions from the question bank.
frontend/src/components/editor/MobileRea: Mobile-friendly floating action button toolbox for selecting sections, headings, and adding question types.
frontend/src/components/editor/RealPaper: Sidebar toolbox for selecting a section and adding predefined question types to a paper.
Coachmark tutorial highlighting the toolbox’s position and guiding the user through its purpose.
frontend/src/components/editor/RichCellE: Rich text and image editor for table cells supporting text input, pasted/uploaded images, and image editing actions.
frontend/src/components/errors/AppErrorB: React error boundary that catches render failures and shows a styled fallback with error details and reload/home actions.
Main app container handling initialization, routing redirects, theme setup, and rendering global UI like navigation and coachmarks.
frontend/src/components/navigation/Navig: Sidebar navigation with links, paper creation, and logout, updating active state based on the current route.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Coach: Overlay guiding users through onboarding steps, positioning tooltips relative to target elements with fallback handling.
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperActio: Overflow menu for paper actions including print, export, share, and delete with dialog support.
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperRende: Renders a question's text and media content, supporting multiple question types with appropriate layouts.
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperSurfa: Main surface for rendering and editing a paper, handling question selection, autofocus, and navigation to question bank or AI insertion flows.
frontend/src/components/paper/QuestionBl: Editor for individual question blocks, providing inputs for different question types and handling updates and deletions.
frontend/src/components/questionBank/Que: Dialog for tagging questions with board, standard, and type before adding them to the question bank.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCoachmarks.ts: Hook managing onboarding coachmarks, including step progression, activation, and DOM‑targeted hints.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedEffect.ts: Hook that debounces an effect function, useful for throttling updates like autosave.
frontend/src/hooks/useDraggableFloatingP: Hook enabling draggable floating UI panels with optional persistence and viewport constraints.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for managing Internet Identity auth, including loading, login, logout, and status tracking via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useRealPaperToolboxSp: Tracks whether the toolbox spotlight has been completed using localStorage and exposes flags plus complete/reset helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Manages light/dark/system theme preference with localStorage persistence and applies CSS class updates based on system settings.
frontend/src/hooks/useUndoRedo.ts: Implements undo/redo state management with history limits, state callbacks, and reset support.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers and extensive CSS variables for light and dark theme colors and layout styling.
frontend/src/lib/ai/mockQuestionGenerato: Generates deterministic mock questions using templates based on topic, difficulty, marks, and style.
frontend/src/lib/editor/insertQuestionsI: Provides utilities to clone questions, compute heading placement, and insert questions into paper sections with correct structure.
Utilities for managing rich cell content including text, inline images, size conversion, creation, extraction from clipboard/files, normalization, and size updates.
frontend/src/lib/editor/sectionInsertCon: Stores, retrieves, and clears section insert context in localStorage for inserting sections from different sources.
Converts a Paper object into formatted plain text and provides a download helper for exporting it as a .txt file.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/extractedTextQuesti: Parses raw OCR text to detect question-like lines using patterns, heuristics, and confidence scoring.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/mockOcrExtractor.ts: Generates OCR sessions by parsing extracted text and producing questions using multiple fallback strategies, with local session storage support.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/ocrQuestionGenerato: Cleans and analyzes text lines to generate structured questions, extract key terms, and build MCQs or fill‑in‑the‑blank items.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/ocrSpaceClient.ts: Client for OCR.space API handling file validation, API requests, and extraction of parsed text with detailed error handling.
frontend/src/lib/papers/createNewPaper.t: Creates a new Paper object with defaults derived from the user profile, initializing metadata and empty sections.
frontend/src/lib/questionBank/detectQues: Heuristically detects a question's type based on text patterns, returning MCQ, true/false, fill‑in‑blank, match‑pairs, table, numerical, or short-answer.
frontend/src/lib/questionBank/questionBa: Defines constants and types for boards, standards, and question-type filters used in the question bank UI.
frontend/src/lib/storage/questionDraftSt: Manages saving, loading, and clearing question drafts in localStorage using safe storage helpers.
frontend/src/lib/storage/safeStorage.ts: Provides safe wrappers around localStorage access, handling availability checks and errors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/ai/AIPreferencesWiref: UI flow for generating AI-based questions, editing them, selecting, and adding to the question bank.
frontend/src/pages/auth/LoginWireframe.t: Login screen supporting Internet Identity authentication or guest mode.
Loads and displays stored drafts, handling storage errors and providing retry and navigation options.
frontend/src/pages/editor/PaperEditorWir: Test paper editor with sections, autosave, undo/redo, and state syncing to stored paper data.
frontend/src/pages/editor/QuestionEntryW: Form to add a new question with autosaved drafts, allowing entry of text, marks, and type, then saving to the personal question bank.
frontend/src/pages/editor/RealPaperEdito: Interactive real-paper editor with section/heading selection, undo/redo, autosave, and toolbox controls for modifying paper structure.
frontend/src/pages/export/ExportPrintPre: Provides print/export preview of a paper with cleanup options, sharing, text download, and print handling.
frontend/src/pages/home/HomeDashboardWir: Home dashboard showing actions like creating papers, accessing question bank, and quick navigation to recent items.
frontend/src/pages/ocr/OCRReviewApproveW: Interface to review OCR‑extracted questions, edit and select them, categorize metadata, and add them to the personal question bank.
frontend/src/pages/ocr/OCRUploadWirefram: Provides a UI for uploading images or PDFs, running OCR extraction, generating questions, and navigating to a review page.
frontend/src/pages/onboarding/Onboarding: Displays an onboarding screen with options to start a tutorial or skip it, then completes onboarding and navigates home.
frontend/src/pages/papers/GeneratedPaper: Shows a list of generated papers with options to edit, export, or delete, and handles empty-state UI.
frontend/src/pages/profile/ProfileWirefr: Allows editing teacher profile defaults such as name, institute, board, and medium, then saves updates to the store.
frontend/src/pages/questionBank/AddQuest: Lets users add personal questions, auto-detect types, confirm or select types, and save them to the question bank.
frontend/src/pages/questionBank/Question: Displays filtered questions by board and standard, supports type filtering, editing, and inserting questions into a paper via context.
React page for browsing starter and personal questions by board and standard, with navigation and section insertion context handling.
frontend/src/pages/settings/SettingsWire: Settings page providing theme selection, tutorial reset, and data clearing actions using mock store and navigation.
frontend/src/state/mockData.ts: Defines profile, question, paper types and provides default profile, starter questions, and sample papers.
frontend/src/state/mockStore.tsx: Implements a mock global store for login state, profile, papers, and questions with persistence, migration, and normalization logic.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, retrieving, and clearing URL and session parameters including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme extensions, colors, typography, animations, and plugin setup.
project_state.json: Describes the project’s current build state, feature requirements, issues, and architectural notes for enhancing a question‑paper creation app. Highlights pending fixes, new flows, type detection, UI updates, and deployment failures.
